name: engineering-workflows
description: Engineering workflow skills for brainstorming, planning, building, TDD, diagnosis, architecture review, codebase orientation, and visual presentation artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Brainstorm, plan, build, diagnose, test, review, and visualize work.
interface.longDescription: Workflow skills for evidence-backed brainstorming, implementation planning, pragmatic building, disciplined debugging, test-driven development, architecture review, high-level codebase orientation, and temporary visual presentation artifacts. Adapted skills preserve source attribution in Agent Skills frontmatter metadata.
defaultPrompt: Use $engineering-workflows:brainstorm to research options for this problem.
Use $engineering-workflows:plan to turn this direction into an implementation-ready plan.
Use $engineering-workflows:build to implement this with pragmatic validation.
Use $engineering-workflows:tdd to implement this with a red-green-refactor loop.
Use $engineering-workflows:zoom-out to explain how this code area fits into the larger system.
Use $engineering-workflows:improve-codebase-architecture to find architecture deepening opportunities.
Use $engineering-workflows:visualize to turn this session into a visual report.
